bug.description: copy-paste error where duplicated code was not correctly updated for its new context

prompt:
There is a copy-paste error where duplicated code was not correctly updated for its new context downstream of function find_drb_by_pdusession_id in the openair2/RRC/NR subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/RRC/NR/rrc_gNB_radio_bearers.c:153.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
